sdp.h(3) Library Functions Manual sdp.h(3)

NAME

sdp.h - SDP (Session Description Protocol) for WebRTC audio/video negotiation.

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct opus_config_t
Opus codec parameters for ascii-chat. struct terminal_format_params_t
Terminal rendering format parameters. struct terminal_capability_t
Supported terminal capability (for offer/answer). struct sdp_session_t
SDP media session (simplified for WebRTC).

Enumerations


enum acip_codec_t { ACIP_CODEC_TRUECOLOR = 96, ACIP_CODEC_256COLOR = 97, ACIP_CODEC_16COLOR = 98, ACIP_CODEC_MONO = 99 }
Terminal rendering capability payload types.

Functions


asciichat_error_t sdp_generate_offer (const terminal_capability_t *capabilities, size_t capability_count, const opus_config_t *audio_config, const terminal_format_params_t *format, uint32_t video_codec_caps, uint32_t audio_codec_caps, sdp_session_t *offer_out)
Generate SDP offer (client side). asciichat_error_t sdp_generate_answer (const sdp_session_t *offer, const terminal_capability_t *server_capabilities, size_t server_capability_count, const opus_config_t *audio_config, const terminal_format_params_t *server_format, uint32_t server_video_codec_caps, uint32_t server_audio_codec_caps, sdp_session_t *answer_out)
Generate SDP answer (server side). asciichat_error_t sdp_parse (const char *sdp_string, sdp_session_t *session)
Parse SDP offer or answer. asciichat_error_t sdp_get_selected_video_codec (const sdp_session_t *answer, acip_codec_t *selected_codec, terminal_format_params_t *selected_format)
Extract selected video codec from SDP answer. asciichat_error_t sdp_detect_terminal_capabilities (terminal_capability_t *capabilities, size_t capability_count, size_t *detected_count)
Detect client terminal capabilities at startup. void sdp_session_destroy (sdp_session_t *session)
Free SDP session resources. const char * sdp_codec_name (acip_codec_t codec)
Get human-readable codec name. const char * sdp_renderer_name (int renderer_type)
Get human-readable renderer name.

Detailed Description

SDP (Session Description Protocol) for WebRTC audio/video negotiation.

Handles SDP offer/answer generation and parsing for WebRTC connections. Includes:

  • Opus audio codec negotiation (48kHz, mono, 24kbps)
  • Terminal capability negotiation via custom ACIP video "codecs"
  • Format parameters for resolution, renderer, charset, compression

SDP Offer/Answer Flow

Client (Joiner) generates OFFER:

  • Lists supported audio codecs (Opus)
  • Lists supported terminal rendering modes in preference order
  • Server selects best mutually-supported mode

Server (Creator) generates ANSWER:

  • Selects single audio codec (Opus)
  • Selects best terminal rendering mode
  • Server enforces its rendering constraints

Terminal Capability Codecs""

These are RTP payload types that represent terminal rendering modes:

  • PT 96: ACIP-TC (Truecolor, 24-bit RGB)
  • PT 97: ACIP-256 (256-color xterm)
  • PT 98: ACIP-16 (16-color ANSI)
  • PT 99: ACIP-MONO (Monochrome, ASCII only)

Author

Zachary Fogg me@zfo.gg

Date

January 2026

Definition in file sdp.h.

Enumeration Type Documentation

enum acip_codec_t

Terminal rendering capability payload types. These are custom "codecs" that represent terminal rendering modes. Used in SDP to negotiate which color mode both peers can support.

Enumerator

ACIP_CODEC_TRUECOLOR
24-bit RGB (truecolor)
ACIP_CODEC_256COLOR
256-color (xterm palette)
ACIP_CODEC_16COLOR
16-color (ANSI standard)
ACIP_CODEC_MONO
Monochrome (ASCII only).

Definition at line 77 of file sdp.h.

77              {
78   ACIP_CODEC_TRUECOLOR = 96, 
79   ACIP_CODEC_256COLOR = 97,  
80   ACIP_CODEC_16COLOR = 98,   
81   ACIP_CODEC_MONO = 99,      
82 } acip_codec_t;










Function
  Documentation




const
  char * sdp_codec_name (acip_codec_t codec)


Get human-readable codec name.


Parameters


codec Codec type


Returns


Static string (e.g., "ACIP-TC",
  "ACIP-256")


Definition at line 24 of file sdp.c.


24                                                {
25   switch (codec) {
26   case ACIP_CODEC_TRUECOLOR:
27     return "ACIP-TC";
28   case ACIP_CODEC_256COLOR:
29     return "ACIP-256";
30   case ACIP_CODEC_16COLOR:
31     return "ACIP-16";
32   case ACIP_CODEC_MONO:
33     return "ACIP-MONO";
34   default:
35     return "UNKNOWN";
36   }
37 }






References ACIP_CODEC_16COLOR, ACIP_CODEC_256COLOR,
    ACIP_CODEC_MONO, and ACIP_CODEC_TRUECOLOR.


Referenced by sdp_generate_answer(),
    sdp_generate_offer(), and sdp_get_selected_video_codec().






asciichat_error_t sdp_detect_terminal_capabilities
  (terminal_capability_t * capabilities, size_t capability_count, size_t
  * detected_count)


Detect client terminal capabilities at startup. Auto-detects from
    environment and terminal:



  
1.

  
COLORTERM env var (truecolor/24bit)

  
2.

  
Terminal color query (terminfo/XTGETTCAP)

  
3.

  
UTF-8 support (LANG, test character)

  
4.

  
CSI REP support (escape sequence test)

  
5.

  
Terminal size (TIOCGWINSZ)




Parameters


capabilities Detected capabilities (output)


capability_count Maximum capabilities to detect


detected_count Actual number detected (output)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code on failure


Definition at line 687 of file sdp.c.


688                                                                            {
689   if (!capabilities || capability_count == 0 || !detected_count) {
690     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid capability detection parameters");
691   }
692 
693   *detected_count = 0;
694   memset(capabilities, 0, capability_count * sizeof(terminal_capability_t));
695 
696   // Detect terminal color level using platform terminal module
697   const char *colorterm = SAFE_GETENV("COLORTERM");
698   const char *term = SAFE_GETENV("TERM");
699   terminal_color_mode_t color_level = TERM_COLOR_NONE;
700 
701   if (colorterm && (strcmp(colorterm, "truecolor") == 0 || strcmp(colorterm, "24bit") == 0)) {
702     color_level = TERM_COLOR_TRUECOLOR;
703   } else if (term) {
704     if (strstr(term, "256color") || strstr(term, "256")) {
705       color_level = TERM_COLOR_256;
706     } else if (strstr(term, "color") || strcmp(term, "xterm") == 0) {
707       color_level = TERM_COLOR_16;
708     }
709   }
710 
711   // Detect UTF-8 support from LANG environment variable
712   const char *lang = SAFE_GETENV("LANG");
713   bool has_utf8 = (lang && (strstr(lang, "UTF-8") || strstr(lang, "utf8")));
714 
715   // CSI REP support correlates with UTF-8
716   bool has_csi_rep = has_utf8;
717 
718   // Get terminal size from platform module
719   uint16_t term_width = 80;  // default
720   uint16_t term_height = 24; // default
721 
722   terminal_size_t term_size;
723   asciichat_error_t term_err = terminal_get_size(&term_size);
724   if (term_err == ASCIICHAT_OK) {
725     term_width = (uint16_t)term_size.cols;
726     term_height = (uint16_t)term_size.rows;
727   } else {
728     log_debug("SDP: Using default terminal size %ux%u", term_width, term_height);
729   }
730 
731   // Fill capabilities array based on detected color level (preference order)
732   size_t idx = 0;
733 
734   if (color_level >= TERM_COLOR_TRUECOLOR && idx < capability_count) {
735     capabilities[idx].codec = ACIP_CODEC_TRUECOLOR;
736     capabilities[idx].format.width = term_width;
737     capabilities[idx].format.height = term_height;
738     capabilities[idx].format.renderer = RENDERER_BLOCK;
739     capabilities[idx].format.charset = has_utf8 ? CHARSET_UTF8 : CHARSET_ASCII;
740     capabilities[idx].format.compression = COMPRESSION_RLE;
741     capabilities[idx].format.csi_rep_support = has_csi_rep;
742     idx++;
743   }
744 
745   if (color_level >= TERM_COLOR_256 && idx < capability_count) {
746     capabilities[idx].codec = ACIP_CODEC_256COLOR;
747     capabilities[idx].format.width = term_width;
748     capabilities[idx].format.height = term_height;
749     capabilities[idx].format.renderer = RENDERER_BLOCK;
750     capabilities[idx].format.charset = has_utf8 ? CHARSET_UTF8 : CHARSET_ASCII;
751     capabilities[idx].format.compression = COMPRESSION_RLE;
752     capabilities[idx].format.csi_rep_support = has_csi_rep;
753     idx++;
754   }
755 
756   if (color_level >= TERM_COLOR_16 && idx < capability_count) {
757     capabilities[idx].codec = ACIP_CODEC_16COLOR;
758     capabilities[idx].format.width = term_width;
759     capabilities[idx].format.height = term_height;
760     capabilities[idx].format.renderer = RENDERER_BLOCK;
761     capabilities[idx].format.charset = has_utf8 ? CHARSET_UTF8 : CHARSET_ASCII;
762     capabilities[idx].format.compression = COMPRESSION_NONE;
763     capabilities[idx].format.csi_rep_support = has_csi_rep;
764     idx++;
765   }
766 
767   // Monochrome always supported
768   if (idx < capability_count) {
769     capabilities[idx].codec = ACIP_CODEC_MONO;
770     capabilities[idx].format.width = term_width;
771     capabilities[idx].format.height = term_height;
772     capabilities[idx].format.renderer = RENDERER_BLOCK;
773     capabilities[idx].format.charset = has_utf8 ? CHARSET_UTF8 : CHARSET_ASCII;
774     capabilities[idx].format.compression = COMPRESSION_NONE;
775     capabilities[idx].format.csi_rep_support = has_csi_rep;
776     idx++;
777   }
778 
779   *detected_count = idx;
780 
781   log_debug("SDP: Detected %zu terminal capabilities (colors=%d, utf8=%s, csi_rep=%s, size=%ux%u)", *detected_count,
782             color_level, has_utf8 ? "yes" : "no", has_csi_rep ? "yes" : "no", term_width, term_height);
783 
784   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
785 }






References ACIP_CODEC_16COLOR, ACIP_CODEC_256COLOR,
    ACIP_CODEC_MONO, ACIP_CODEC_TRUECOLOR, ASCIICHAT_OK,
    terminal_format_params_t::charset,
    terminal_capability_t::codec, terminal_size_t::cols,
    terminal_format_params_t::compression,
    terminal_format_params_t::csi_rep_support,
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, terminal_capability_t::format,
    terminal_format_params_t::height, log_debug,
    terminal_format_params_t::renderer, terminal_size_t::rows,
    SAFE_GETENV, SET_ERRNO, TERM_COLOR_16,
    TERM_COLOR_256, TERM_COLOR_NONE, TERM_COLOR_TRUECOLOR,
    terminal_get_size(), and terminal_format_params_t::width.






asciichat_error_t sdp_generate_answer (const
  sdp_session_t * offer, const terminal_capability_t *
  server_capabilities, size_t server_capability_count, const
  opus_config_t * audio_config, const terminal_format_params_t *
  server_format, uint32_t server_video_codec_caps, uint32_t
  server_audio_codec_caps, sdp_session_t * answer_out)


Generate SDP answer (server side). Creates an SDP answer by
    selecting best mutually-supported mode from offer. Server enforces its
    rendering constraints and codec capabilities. Performs codec capability
    negotiation (intersection of client and server capabilities).




Parameters


offer Received SDP offer from client (includes
  client's codec capabilities)


server_capabilities Array of server-supported terminal capabilities


server_capability_count Number of server capabilities


audio_config Opus codec configuration


server_format Server's rendering constraints


server_video_codec_caps Bitmask of server's supported video codecs
  (VIDEO_CODEC_CAP_*)


server_audio_codec_caps Bitmask of server's supported audio codecs
  (AUDIO_CODEC_CAP_*)


answer_out Generated SDP answer (output)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code on failure


Note


Caller must free answer_out using
  sdp_session_destroy()


Definition at line 184 of file sdp.c.


188                                                                  {
189   if (!offer || !server_capabilities || server_capability_count == 0 || !audio_config || !answer_out) {
190     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid SDP answer parameters");
191   }
192 
193   memset(answer_out, 0, sizeof(sdp_session_t));
194 
195   // Copy session ID from offer, increment version
196   SAFE_STRNCPY(answer_out->session_id, offer->session_id, sizeof(answer_out->session_id));
197 
198   time_t now = time(NULL);
199   safe_snprintf(answer_out->session_version, sizeof(answer_out->session_version), "%ld", now);
200 
201   // Answer audio section: accept Opus with codec capability negotiation
202   answer_out->has_audio = offer->has_audio;
203   if (answer_out->has_audio) {
204     memcpy(&answer_out->audio_config, audio_config, sizeof(opus_config_t));
205     // Negotiate audio codec capabilities: intersection of client and server
206     answer_out->codec_capabilities_audio = offer->codec_capabilities_audio & server_audio_codec_caps;
207     log_debug("SDP: Audio codec negotiation - client=0x%x server=0x%x negotiated=0x%x",
208               offer->codec_capabilities_audio, server_audio_codec_caps, answer_out->codec_capabilities_audio);
209   }
210 
211   // Answer video section: find best mutually-supported codec with capability negotiation
212   answer_out->has_video = offer->has_video;
213 
214   if (answer_out->has_video && offer->video_codecs && offer->video_codec_count > 0) {
215     // Negotiate video codec capabilities: intersection of client and server
216     answer_out->codec_capabilities_video = offer->codec_capabilities_video & server_video_codec_caps;
217     log_debug("SDP: Video codec negotiation - client=0x%x server=0x%x negotiated=0x%x",
218               offer->codec_capabilities_video, server_video_codec_caps, answer_out->codec_capabilities_video);
219 
220     // Find best terminal capability codec: iterate through server preferences and find first match in offer
221     int selected_index = -1;
222 
223     for (size_t s = 0; s < server_capability_count; s++) {
224       for (size_t o = 0; o < offer->video_codec_count; o++) {
225         if (server_capabilities[s].codec == offer->video_codecs[o].codec) {
226           selected_index = (int)s;
227           break; // Found match, use server's preference order
228         }
229       }
230       if (selected_index >= 0) {
231         break;
232       }
233     }
234 
235     // Allocate and fill selected codec
236     answer_out->video_codecs = SAFE_MALLOC(sizeof(terminal_capability_t), terminal_capability_t *);
237     answer_out->video_codec_count = 1;
238 
239     // Use server's capability with any server_format overrides
240     if (selected_index >= 0) {
241       memcpy(answer_out->video_codecs, &server_capabilities[selected_index], sizeof(terminal_capability_t));
242     } else {
243       // Fallback to monochrome
244       memcpy(answer_out->video_codecs, &server_capabilities[0], sizeof(terminal_capability_t));
245     }
246 
247     // Apply server format constraints if provided
248     if (server_format) {
249       if (server_format->width > 0) {
250         answer_out->video_codecs[0].format.width = server_format->width;
251       }
252       if (server_format->height > 0) {
253         answer_out->video_codecs[0].format.height = server_format->height;
254       }
255       if (server_format->renderer != RENDERER_BLOCK) {
256         answer_out->video_codecs[0].format.renderer = server_format->renderer;
257       }
258       if (server_format->compression != COMPRESSION_NONE) {
259         answer_out->video_codecs[0].format.compression = server_format->compression;
260       }
261     }
262 
263     memcpy(&answer_out->video_format, &answer_out->video_codecs[0].format, sizeof(terminal_format_params_t));
264   }
265 
266   // Build complete SDP answer
267   char *sdp = answer_out->sdp_string;
268   size_t remaining = sizeof(answer_out->sdp_string);
269   int written = 0;
270 
271   // Session-level attributes
272   written = safe_snprintf(sdp, remaining, "v=0\r\n");
273   sdp += written;
274   remaining -= written;
275 
276   written = safe_snprintf(sdp, remaining, "o=ascii-chat %s %s IN IP4 0.0.0.0\r\n", answer_out->session_id,
277                           answer_out->session_version);
278   sdp += written;
279   remaining -= written;
280 
281   written = safe_snprintf(sdp, remaining, "s=-\r\n");
282   sdp += written;
283   remaining -= written;
284 
285   written = safe_snprintf(sdp, remaining, "t=0 0\r\n");
286   sdp += written;
287   remaining -= written;
288 
289   // Audio media section (if present in offer)
290   if (answer_out->has_audio) {
291     written = safe_snprintf(sdp, remaining, "m=audio 9 UDP/TLS/RTP/SAVPF 111\r\n");
292     sdp += written;
293     remaining -= written;
294 
295     written = safe_snprintf(sdp, remaining, "a=rtpmap:111 opus/48000/2\r\n");
296     sdp += written;
297     remaining -= written;
298 
299     written = safe_snprintf(sdp, remaining, "a=fmtp:111 minptime=10;useinbandfec=1;usedtx=1\r\n");
300     sdp += written;
301     remaining -= written;
302 
303     // Negotiated audio codec capabilities (custom attribute)
304     written = safe_snprintf(sdp, remaining, "a=codec-capabilities-audio:0x%x\r\n", answer_out->codec_capabilities_audio);
305     sdp += written;
306     remaining -= written;
307   }
308 
309   // Video media section (if present in offer)
310   if (answer_out->has_video && answer_out->video_codecs && answer_out->video_codec_count > 0) {
311     written = safe_snprintf(sdp, remaining, "m=video 9 UDP/TLS/RTP/SAVPF 96\r\n");
312     sdp += written;
313     remaining -= written;
314 
315     const char *codec_name = sdp_codec_name(answer_out->video_codecs[0].codec);
316     written = safe_snprintf(sdp, remaining, "a=rtpmap:96 %s/90000\r\n", codec_name);
317     sdp += written;
318     remaining -= written;
319 
320     // Format parameters
321     const terminal_format_params_t *cap_format = &answer_out->video_codecs[0].format;
322     const char *renderer_name = sdp_renderer_name(cap_format->renderer);
323     const char *charset_name = (cap_format->charset == CHARSET_UTF8) ? "utf8" : "ascii";
324     const char *compression_name = "none";
325     if (cap_format->compression == COMPRESSION_RLE) {
326       compression_name = "rle";
327     } else if (cap_format->compression == COMPRESSION_ZSTD) {
328       compression_name = "zstd";
329     }
330 
331     written = safe_snprintf(sdp, remaining,
332                             "a=fmtp:96 width=%u;height=%u;renderer=%s;charset=%s;compression=%s;csi_rep=%d\r\n",
333                             cap_format->width, cap_format->height, renderer_name, charset_name, compression_name,
334                             cap_format->csi_rep_support ? 1 : 0);
335     sdp += written;
336     remaining -= written;
337 
338     // Negotiated video codec capabilities (custom attribute)
339     written = safe_snprintf(sdp, remaining, "a=codec-capabilities-video:0x%x\r\n", answer_out->codec_capabilities_video);
340     sdp += written;
341     remaining -= written;
342   }
343 
344   answer_out->sdp_length = strlen(answer_out->sdp_string);
345 
346   log_debug("SDP: Generated answer with codec %s", sdp_codec_name(answer_out->video_codecs[0].codec));
347 
348   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
349 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK,
    sdp_session_t::audio_config,
    terminal_format_params_t::charset,
    terminal_capability_t::codec,
    sdp_session_t::codec_capabilities_audio,
    sdp_session_t::codec_capabilities_video,
    terminal_format_params_t::compression,
    terminal_format_params_t::csi_rep_support,
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, terminal_capability_t::format,
    sdp_session_t::has_audio, sdp_session_t::has_video,
    terminal_format_params_t::height, log_debug,
    terminal_format_params_t::renderer, SAFE_MALLOC,
    safe_snprintf(), SAFE_STRNCPY, sdp_codec_name(),
    sdp_session_t::sdp_length, sdp_renderer_name(),
    sdp_session_t::sdp_string, sdp_session_t::session_id,
    sdp_session_t::session_version, SET_ERRNO,
    sdp_session_t::video_codec_count, sdp_session_t::video_codecs,
    sdp_session_t::video_format, and
    terminal_format_params_t::width.






asciichat_error_t sdp_generate_offer (const
  terminal_capability_t * capabilities, size_t capability_count, const
  opus_config_t * audio_config, const terminal_format_params_t *
  format, uint32_t video_codec_caps, uint32_t audio_codec_caps,
  sdp_session_t * offer_out)


Generate SDP offer (client side). Creates an SDP offer with:


    
  
  • Opus audio codec with audio codec capabilities (AUDIO_CODEC_CAP_*)
    • 
  
  • Terminal capabilities in client preference order with video codec
      capabilities (VIDEO_CODEC_CAP_*)
    • 



Parameters


capabilities Array of supported terminal
  capabilities


capability_count Number of capabilities


audio_config Opus codec configuration


format Format parameters for video section


video_codec_caps Bitmask of supported video codecs (VIDEO_CODEC_CAP_*)


audio_codec_caps Bitmask of supported audio codecs (AUDIO_CODEC_CAP_*)


offer_out Generated SDP offer (output)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code on failure


Note


Caller must free offer_out using
  sdp_session_destroy()


Definition at line 56 of file sdp.c.


59                                                                {
60   if (!capabilities || capability_count == 0 || !audio_config || !offer_out) {
61     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid SDP offer parameters");
62   }
63 
64   memset(offer_out, 0, sizeof(sdp_session_t));
65 
66   // Generate session ID and version from current time
67   time_t now = time(NULL);
68   safe_snprintf(offer_out->session_id, sizeof(offer_out->session_id), "%ld", now);
69   safe_snprintf(offer_out->session_version, sizeof(offer_out->session_version), "%ld", now);
70 
71   // Allocate and copy video codecs (terminal capabilities)
72   offer_out->video_codecs = SAFE_MALLOC(capability_count * sizeof(terminal_capability_t), terminal_capability_t *);
73   memcpy(offer_out->video_codecs, capabilities, capability_count * sizeof(terminal_capability_t));
74   offer_out->video_codec_count = capability_count;
75 
76   // Store codec capabilities (for SDP negotiation)
77   offer_out->codec_capabilities_video = video_codec_caps;
78   offer_out->codec_capabilities_audio = audio_codec_caps;
79 
80   offer_out->has_audio = true;
81   memcpy(&offer_out->audio_config, audio_config, sizeof(opus_config_t));
82 
83   offer_out->has_video = true;
84   if (format) {
85     memcpy(&offer_out->video_format, format, sizeof(terminal_format_params_t));
86   }
87 
88   // Build complete SDP offer
89   char *sdp = offer_out->sdp_string;
90   size_t remaining = sizeof(offer_out->sdp_string);
91   int written = 0;
92 
93   // Session-level attributes
94   written = safe_snprintf(sdp, remaining, "v=0\r\n");
95   sdp += written;
96   remaining -= written;
97 
98   written = safe_snprintf(sdp, remaining, "o=ascii-chat %s %s IN IP4 0.0.0.0\r\n", offer_out->session_id,
99                           offer_out->session_version);
100   sdp += written;
101   remaining -= written;
102 
103   written = safe_snprintf(sdp, remaining, "s=-\r\n");
104   sdp += written;
105   remaining -= written;
106 
107   written = safe_snprintf(sdp, remaining, "t=0 0\r\n");
108   sdp += written;
109   remaining -= written;
110 
111   // Audio media section
112   written = safe_snprintf(sdp, remaining, "m=audio 9 UDP/TLS/RTP/SAVPF 111\r\n");
113   sdp += written;
114   remaining -= written;
115 
116   written = safe_snprintf(sdp, remaining, "a=rtpmap:111 opus/48000/2\r\n");
117   sdp += written;
118   remaining -= written;
119 
120   written = safe_snprintf(sdp, remaining, "a=fmtp:111 minptime=10;useinbandfec=1;usedtx=1\r\n");
121   sdp += written;
122   remaining -= written;
123 
124   // Audio codec capabilities (custom attribute)
125   written = safe_snprintf(sdp, remaining, "a=codec-capabilities-audio:0x%x\r\n", audio_codec_caps);
126   sdp += written;
127   remaining -= written;
128 
129   // Video media section with terminal capabilities
130   char codec_list[128] = "96";
131   size_t codec_pos = strlen(codec_list);
132   for (size_t i = 1; i < capability_count && codec_pos < sizeof(codec_list) - 1; i++) {
133     codec_pos += safe_snprintf(codec_list + codec_pos, sizeof(codec_list) - codec_pos, " %d", 96 + (int)i);
134   }
135 
136   written = safe_snprintf(sdp, remaining, "m=video 9 UDP/TLS/RTP/SAVPF %s\r\n", codec_list);
137   sdp += written;
138   remaining -= written;
139 
140   // Add rtpmap and fmtp for each capability
141   for (size_t i = 0; i < capability_count; i++) {
142     int pt = 96 + (int)i;
143     const char *codec_name = sdp_codec_name(capabilities[i].codec);
144 
145     written = safe_snprintf(sdp, remaining, "a=rtpmap:%d %s/90000\r\n", pt, codec_name);
146     sdp += written;
147     remaining -= written;
148 
149     // Format parameters
150     const terminal_format_params_t *cap_format = &capabilities[i].format;
151     const char *renderer_name = sdp_renderer_name(cap_format->renderer);
152     const char *charset_name = (cap_format->charset == CHARSET_UTF8) ? "utf8" : "ascii";
153     const char *compression_name = "none";
154     if (cap_format->compression == COMPRESSION_RLE) {
155       compression_name = "rle";
156     } else if (cap_format->compression == COMPRESSION_ZSTD) {
157       compression_name = "zstd";
158     }
159 
160     written = safe_snprintf(sdp, remaining,
161                             "a=fmtp:%d width=%u;height=%u;renderer=%s;charset=%s;compression=%s;csi_rep=%d\r\n", pt,
162                             cap_format->width, cap_format->height, renderer_name, charset_name, compression_name,
163                             cap_format->csi_rep_support ? 1 : 0);
164     sdp += written;
165     remaining -= written;
166   }
167 
168   // Video codec capabilities (custom attribute)
169   written = safe_snprintf(sdp, remaining, "a=codec-capabilities-video:0x%x\r\n", video_codec_caps);
170   sdp += written;
171   remaining -= written;
172 
173   offer_out->sdp_length = strlen(offer_out->sdp_string);
174 
175   log_debug("SDP: Generated offer with %zu video codecs and Opus audio", capability_count);
176 
177   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
178 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK,
    sdp_session_t::audio_config,
    terminal_format_params_t::charset,
    sdp_session_t::codec_capabilities_audio,
    sdp_session_t::codec_capabilities_video,
    terminal_format_params_t::compression,
    terminal_format_params_t::csi_rep_support,
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, terminal_capability_t::format,
    sdp_session_t::has_audio, sdp_session_t::has_video,
    terminal_format_params_t::height, log_debug,
    terminal_format_params_t::renderer, SAFE_MALLOC,
    safe_snprintf(), sdp_codec_name(),
    sdp_session_t::sdp_length, sdp_renderer_name(),
    sdp_session_t::sdp_string, sdp_session_t::session_id,
    sdp_session_t::session_version, SET_ERRNO,
    sdp_session_t::video_codec_count, sdp_session_t::video_codecs,
    sdp_session_t::video_format, and
    terminal_format_params_t::width.






asciichat_error_t sdp_get_selected_video_codec (const
  sdp_session_t * answer, acip_codec_t * selected_codec,
  terminal_format_params_t * selected_format)


Extract selected video codec from SDP answer. Determines which
    terminal rendering capability the peer selected.




Parameters


answer SDP answer from peer


selected_codec Selected codec (output)


selected_format Format parameters (output)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK if valid selection found, error
  otherwise


Definition at line 660 of file sdp.c.


661                                                                                           {
662   if (!answer || !selected_codec || !selected_format) {
663     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid parameters for codec selection");
664   }
665 
666   if (!answer->has_video || !answer->video_codecs || answer->video_codec_count == 0) {
667     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NOT_FOUND, "No video codec in answer");
668   }
669 
670   // In SDP answer, server selects only ONE codec (server's preference)
671   // The first codec in the answer is the selected one
672   terminal_capability_t *selected_cap = &answer->video_codecs[0];
673 
674   *selected_codec = selected_cap->codec;
675   memcpy(selected_format, &selected_cap->format, sizeof(terminal_format_params_t));
676 
677   log_debug("SDP: Selected video codec %s with resolution %ux%u", sdp_codec_name(selected_cap->codec),
678             selected_cap->format.width, selected_cap->format.height);
679 
680   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
681 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK,
    terminal_capability_t::codec, ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
    ERROR_NOT_FOUND, terminal_capability_t::format,
    sdp_session_t::has_video, terminal_format_params_t::height,
    log_debug, sdp_codec_name(), SET_ERRNO,
    sdp_session_t::video_codec_count, sdp_session_t::video_codecs,
    and terminal_format_params_t::width.






asciichat_error_t sdp_parse (const char * sdp_string,
  sdp_session_t * session)


Parse SDP offer or answer. Parses an SDP string and extracts
    audio/video configurations.




Parameters


sdp_string SDP string (null-terminated)


Session Parsed session (output)


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code on failure


Definition at line 479 of file sdp.c.


479                                                                             {
480   if (!sdp_string || !session) {
481     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid SDP parse parameters");
482   }
483 
484   memset(session, 0, sizeof(sdp_session_t));
485 
486   // Copy original SDP string for reference
487   SAFE_STRNCPY(session->sdp_string, sdp_string, sizeof(session->sdp_string));
488   session->sdp_length = strlen(sdp_string);
489 
490   // Parse line by line
491   char line_buffer[512];
492   SAFE_STRNCPY(line_buffer, sdp_string, sizeof(line_buffer));
493 
494   char *saveptr = NULL;
495   char *line = platform_strtok_r(line_buffer, "\r\n", &saveptr);
496 
497   int in_audio_section = 0;
498   int in_video_section = 0;
499   size_t video_codec_index = 0;
500 
501   while (line) {
502     // Parse line format: "key=value"
503     char *equals = strchr(line, '=');
504     if (!equals) {
505       line = platform_strtok_r(NULL, "\r\n", &saveptr);
506       continue;
507     }
508 
509     char key = line[0];
510     const char *value = equals + 1;
511 
512     switch (key) {
513     case 'v':
514       // v=0 (version)
515       break;
516 
517     case 'o':
518       // o=username session_id session_version ... session_id ...
519       // Parse session ID (second field)
520       {
521         char o_copy[256];
522         SAFE_STRNCPY(o_copy, value, sizeof(o_copy));
523         char *o_saveptr = NULL;
524         platform_strtok_r(o_copy, " ", &o_saveptr); // username
525         char *session_id_str = platform_strtok_r(NULL, " ", &o_saveptr);
526         if (session_id_str) {
527           SAFE_STRNCPY(session->session_id, session_id_str, sizeof(session->session_id));
528         }
529       }
530       break;
531 
532     case 's':
533       // s=session_name (typically "-" or empty)
534       break;
535 
536     case 'm':
537       // m=audio 9 UDP/TLS/RTP/SAVPF ...
538       // m=video 9 UDP/TLS/RTP/SAVPF ...
539       in_audio_section = 0;
540       in_video_section = 0;
541 
542       if (strstr(value, "audio")) {
543         in_audio_section = 1;
544         session->has_audio = true;
545       } else if (strstr(value, "video")) {
546         in_video_section = 1;
547         session->has_video = true;
548         video_codec_index = 0;
549       }
550       break;
551 
552     case 'a':
553       // a=rtpmap:111 opus/48000/2
554       // a=fmtp:111 minptime=10;useinbandfec=1;usedtx=1
555       // a=rtpmap:96 ACIP-TC/90000
556       // a=fmtp:96 ...
557       // a=codec-capabilities-video:0x...
558       // a=codec-capabilities-audio:0x...
559 
560       if (strstr(value, "codec-capabilities-video:")) {
561         // Parse video codec capabilities: "codec-capabilities-video:0xHH"
562         const char *cap_str = value + strlen("codec-capabilities-video:");
563         session->codec_capabilities_video = (uint32_t)strtol(cap_str, NULL, 16);
564         log_debug("SDP: Parsed video codec capabilities: 0x%x", session->codec_capabilities_video);
565       } else if (strstr(value, "codec-capabilities-audio:")) {
566         // Parse audio codec capabilities: "codec-capabilities-audio:0xHH"
567         const char *cap_str = value + strlen("codec-capabilities-audio:");
568         session->codec_capabilities_audio = (uint32_t)strtol(cap_str, NULL, 16);
569         log_debug("SDP: Parsed audio codec capabilities: 0x%x", session->codec_capabilities_audio);
570       } else if (strstr(value, "rtpmap:")) {
571         const char *rtpmap = value + 7; // Skip "rtpmap:"
572 
573         // Parse: PT codec/rate[/channels]
574         char *endptr = NULL;
575         int pt = (int)strtol(rtpmap, &endptr, 10);
576         char codec_name[32] = {0};
577         if (endptr && *endptr == ' ') {
578           SAFE_STRNCPY(codec_name, endptr + 1, sizeof(codec_name));
579         }
580 
581         if (in_audio_section && pt == 111 && strstr(codec_name, "opus")) {
582           // Opus audio
583           session->audio_config.sample_rate = 48000;
584           session->audio_config.channels = 2;
585         } else if (in_video_section && video_codec_index < 4) {
586           // Terminal capability codec
587           if (!session->video_codecs) {
588             session->video_codecs = SAFE_MALLOC(4 * sizeof(terminal_capability_t), terminal_capability_t *);
589           }
590 
591           terminal_capability_t *cap = &session->video_codecs[video_codec_index];
592           memset(cap, 0, sizeof(terminal_capability_t));
593 
594           if (pt == 96 && strstr(codec_name, "ACIP-TC")) {
595             cap->codec = ACIP_CODEC_TRUECOLOR;
596             video_codec_index++;
597             session->video_codec_count++;
598           } else if (pt == 97 && strstr(codec_name, "ACIP-256")) {
599             cap->codec = ACIP_CODEC_256COLOR;
600             video_codec_index++;
601             session->video_codec_count++;
602           } else if (pt == 98 && strstr(codec_name, "ACIP-16")) {
603             cap->codec = ACIP_CODEC_16COLOR;
604             video_codec_index++;
605             session->video_codec_count++;
606           } else if (pt == 99 && strstr(codec_name, "ACIP-MONO")) {
607             cap->codec = ACIP_CODEC_MONO;
608             video_codec_index++;
609             session->video_codec_count++;
610           }
611         }
612       } else if (strstr(value, "fmtp:")) {
613         // Parse format parameters
614         // a=fmtp:111 minptime=10;useinbandfec=1;usedtx=1
615         // a=fmtp:96 width=80;height=24;renderer=block;charset=utf8;compression=rle;csi_rep=1
616 
617         const char *fmtp = value + 5; // Skip "fmtp:"
618 
619         if (in_audio_section) {
620           // Parse Opus parameters
621           if (strstr(fmtp, "useinbandfec=1")) {
622             session->audio_config.fec_enabled = true;
623           }
624           if (strstr(fmtp, "usedtx=1")) {
625             session->audio_config.dtx_enabled = true;
626           }
627           // Default values for Opus
628           session->audio_config.bitrate = 24000;
629           session->audio_config.frame_duration = 20;
630         } else if (in_video_section && video_codec_index > 0) {
631           // Parse terminal format parameters
632           terminal_capability_t *cap = &session->video_codecs[video_codec_index - 1];
633 
634           // Skip PT number in fmtp string (format: "96 width=...")
635           const char *params = fmtp;
636           while (*params && *params != ' ') {
637             params++;
638           }
639           if (*params == ' ') {
640             params++; // Skip space after PT
641           }
642 
643           // Parse with PCRE2 regex (atomic extraction)
644           sdp_parse_fmtp_video_pcre2(params, cap);
645         }
646       }
647       break;
648     }
649 
650     line = platform_strtok_r(NULL, "\r\n", &saveptr);
651   }
652 
653   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
654 }






References ACIP_CODEC_16COLOR, ACIP_CODEC_256COLOR,
    ACIP_CODEC_MONO, ACIP_CODEC_TRUECOLOR, ASCIICHAT_OK,
    sdp_session_t::audio_config, opus_config_t::bitrate,
    opus_config_t::channels, terminal_capability_t::codec,
    sdp_session_t::codec_capabilities_audio,
    sdp_session_t::codec_capabilities_video,
    opus_config_t::dtx_enabled, ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
    opus_config_t::fec_enabled, opus_config_t::frame_duration,
    sdp_session_t::has_audio, sdp_session_t::has_video,
    line_buffer, log_debug, platform_strtok_r(),
    SAFE_MALLOC, SAFE_STRNCPY, opus_config_t::sample_rate,
    sdp_session_t::sdp_length, sdp_session_t::sdp_string,
    sdp_session_t::session_id, SET_ERRNO,
    sdp_session_t::video_codec_count, and
    sdp_session_t::video_codecs.






const
  char * sdp_renderer_name (int renderer_type)


Get human-readable renderer name.


Returns


Static string (e.g., "block",
  "halfblock")


Definition at line 39 of file sdp.c.


39                                                  {
40   switch (renderer_type) {
41   case RENDERER_BLOCK:
42     return "block";
43   case RENDERER_HALFBLOCK:
44     return "halfblock";
45   case RENDERER_BRAILLE:
46     return "braille";
47   default:
48     return "unknown";
49   }
50 }






Referenced by sdp_generate_answer(), and
    sdp_generate_offer().






void
  sdp_session_destroy (sdp_session_t * session)


Free SDP session resources.


Parameters


Session Session to free


Definition at line 791 of file sdp.c.


791                                                  {
792   if (!session) {
793     return;
794   }
795 
796   // Free allocated video codec array
797   if (session->video_codecs) {
798     SAFE_FREE(session->video_codecs);
799     session->video_codec_count = 0;
800   }
801 
802   // Zero out the session structure
803   memset(session, 0, sizeof(sdp_session_t));
804 }






References SAFE_FREE,
    sdp_session_t::video_codec_count, and
    sdp_session_t::video_codecs.
